description.content: Lobbying disclosure filings (LD-1, LD-2, LD-203)
Returns a paginated list of lobbying disclosure filings. Supports filtering by filing type, year, period, registrant, and client.

query.description: Filing type code (e.g., LD1=Registration, LD2=Quarterly Report, MM=Mid-Year Report)

Number of results per page (default 25, max 25)

info.name: US Senate Lobbying Disclosure Act (LDA) API

description.content:
The Senate Lobbying Disclosure Act (LDA) REST API provides public access to lobbying filings, registrations, quarterly activity reports (LD-2), and semi-annual contribution reports (LD-203). An optional API key increases the rate limit from 15 to 120 requests per minute.

Contact Support:
 Name: Senate Office of Public Records
 Email: lobby@sec.senate.gov
